name: Enhanced Text Fields
description: Enhances REDCap text fields with JSON and Markdown editing, validation, formatting, and preview tools.

authors.name: Günther Rezniczek
authors.institution: St. Elisabethgruppe GmbH - Marien Hospital Herne | Klinikum der Ruhr-Universität Bochum

action-tags.description: Enhance text and Notes field values with editable JSON in Ace on data entry forms and survey pages. Optional quoted parameters: initial:json, initial:raw, height:200, format:pretty, format:compact, json-only.
Enhance Notes field values with Markdown editing and HTML preview on data entry forms and survey pages. Optional quoted parameters: initial:md, initial:html, initial:raw, height:200, md-only.

project-settings.name: Output debug information to the browser console
